data.settleTest: The load-bearing claim is that 2026 wholesale colo fit-outs will standardize on busway/power-shelf and drop PDU content below the model's assumption. Only actual 2026 tenant BOMs and fit-out specs from Frankfurt/Amsterdam wholesale deals — which do not yet exist — would settle whether PDU content falls; the segment share itself (0.18) is a defensible today-value backed by Synergy's series.

researchQueries.query: CBRE and JLL European wholesale colocation fit-out specifications 2025-2026: busway vs rack-PDU power distribution standardization in Frankfurt and Amsterdam single-let facilities
Retail vs wholesale colocation rack power distribution BOM comparison: evidence that hyperscale wholesale tenants still specify rack-mount PDUs at retail-colo intensity in European FLAP-D markets
